proposal_or_rule: Commercial Autonomous Vehicle Operations Ordinance - Docket 1432
summary: The proposed ordinance would pause commercial AV operations until a study and permit process are completed and would require a human safety operator.
Official Council legislation record located. Specific fees fleet limits and insurance provisions still require confirmation from the official bill attachment.

proposal_or_rule: City AV coordination and incident tracking
summary: Texas law prevents Austin from separately regulating AV operation. The city coordinates with operators and tracks reported AV incidents.
LADOT manages transportation technology through safety accessibility mobility-data curb and public-right-of-way policies. No AV-specific fleet cap or permit was confirmed in this source.
